name: @pantoken/components
description: An InstUI-look CSS component library from the pantoken tokens: prose/content styling plus class-based components (button, alert, badge).

scripts.dev: vp run @pantoken/plugin-theme-custom-media#build && node scripts/component-styles.ts && node scripts/generate.ts && node scripts/build-entries.ts && vp pack --watch
scripts.test: vp run @pantoken/plugin-theme-custom-media#build && node scripts/component-styles.ts && vp test
scripts.check: vp run @pantoken/plugin-theme-custom-media#build && node scripts/component-styles.ts && node scripts/build-entries.ts && vp check
